spec_match.rationale: Excellent representation of logical start/end keyword mappings in text-decoration-skip-spaces across RTL (direction: rtl) and vertical writing modes (writing-mode: vertical-rl).

interactive.rationale: Provides button controls that apply values across LTR, RTL, and Vertical boxes concurrently. It also features glowing green/grey logical indicators ('start = right edge', etc.) that change states dynamically based on your active selection.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent description perfectly: compares LTR, RTL, and vertical simultaneously, making the direction-awareness of skip-spaces obvious.

edge_cases.rationale: Tackles internationalization (Arabic and CJK layouts) and multi-directional writing modes, which are the ultimate edge cases in text styling.

references.rationale: Includes direct links to W3C draft specs, the target ChromeStatus entry, and companion concepts.

design_system.rationale: Flawless implementation using standard card blocks, crumb headers, mono elements, and variable margins.

summary: A masterpiece of internationalization (i18n) and logical text layout. It concurrently renders and controls LTR English, RTL Arabic, and Vertical Japanese, dynamically lighting up color-coded logical boundary maps underneath each layout. It is fully compliant with every rubric criterion and design standard.
